summary: Iteration 205: Governance Dashboard + AP Advisory Phase 3 testing complete. All 18 backend API tests passed. All 7 frontend tests passed. Verified: (1) GET /api/governance/dashboard returns valid JSON with sales_orders, ap_invoices, system_health, combined_drift sections, (2) System health shows 7 metrics including total_documents, pending_review, completed, posted_to_bc_7d, ready_to_post, vendor_profiles, automation_rate, (3) AP Advisory Phase 3 suggestion workflow (approve/reject/apply) returns 422 for nonexistent suggestions, (4) Learning impact review, profile drift, and vendor hotspots endpoints all return valid JSON.
critical_code_review_comments: governance.py: Dashboard endpoint correctly aggregates SO + AP metrics without auth requirement
ap_advisory.py: Phase 3 endpoints (approve/reject/apply) correctly require JWT auth and return 422 for nonexistent suggestions
GovernanceDashboard.js: All 7 system health stat cards have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Layout.js: Governance nav item correctly added to sidebar navigation

success_rate.backend: 100% (18/18 API tests passed, 12/12 unit tests passed)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - preview environment has existing data (25 docs, 604 vendor profiles)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 205 verified Governance Dashboard and AP Advisory Phase 3 features. Backend: GET /api/governance/dashboard returns sales_orders, ap_invoices, system_health (7 metrics), combined_drift. AP Advisory Phase 3: approve/reject/apply require auth and return 422 for nonexistent suggestions. Learning impact review, profile drift, vendor hotspots all working. Frontend: Governance page loads at /governance with all UI elements (7 stat cards, combined drift card, SO/AP pipeline cards side by side, sidebar nav). Preview environment shows: 25 total docs, 0 pending, 7 completed, 604 vendor profiles, 28% automation rate.
